title: zalal #2151
definition:
1) to be worthless, be vile, be insignificant, be light
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be worthless, be insignificant
        1a2) to make light of, squander, be lavish with
 2) to shake, tremble, quake
    1a) (Niphal) to shake, quake
